purpose: Migration inventory of current built-in assumptions that should be moved to declared host state, learned Memory, planning state, contracts, config, or removed from package runtime over time.

entries.current_assumption: Workspace fallback output rendering still knows which payload kinds need AW-specific text compatibility.
entries.desired_owner: declared view specs plus portable CG view/render primitives where behavior is generic
entries.next_migration_step: Move each stable fallback text view to declared view specs once the view contract is explicit.
entries.agent_judgment_boundary: The agent decides when a view is truly generic; the inventory only names the current built-in assumption.

entries.current_assumption: Maintainer audit rows can identify hard-coded string tables that might otherwise become hidden routing policy.
entries.desired_owner: structured state, config, manifest metadata, or learned Memory if any row becomes decision-affecting
entries.next_migration_step: Keep the audit advisory; migrate any decision-affecting row to a structured owner before runtime use.
entries.agent_judgment_boundary: The audit does not make string matches authoritative; it surfaces rows the agent must classify.

entries.current_assumption: This repo's proof commands are recorded in a maintainer inventory and checked for drift.
entries.desired_owner: host-declared proof config when commands affect ordinary proof routing
entries.next_migration_step: Promote only proof-routing decisions to host-declared config; keep drift audits advisory.
entries.agent_judgment_boundary: The inventory does not make pytest, ruff, uv, or any command universal AW defaults.

entries.current_assumption: Repo-local issue body helpers encode the current GitHub issue shape used by this repository.
entries.desired_owner: provider-agnostic external intent evidence if consumed by package runtime
entries.next_migration_step: Do not promote issue body phrasing into package semantics; route tracker facts through external-intent evidence.
entries.agent_judgment_boundary: Issue templates and helper scripts may aid this repo but do not define universal tracker semantics.

entries.current_assumption: Verification protocols can still include task marker hints as activation evidence.
entries.desired_owner: host-declared verification manifest evidence, never package-owned prose routing
entries.next_migration_step: Keep marker hints host-declared and advisory; prefer structured path, protocol, proof-route, and state evidence when available.
entries.agent_judgment_boundary: Task markers can only surface candidate proof routes; the agent owns semantic fit and proof sufficiency.

entries.current_assumption: Maintainer harnesses encode local provider and model-cli evaluation assumptions.
entries.desired_owner: portable agent integration contract only if promoted beyond maintainer evaluation
entries.next_migration_step: Keep harness findings as dogfooding evidence unless a reusable provider contract is explicitly declared.
entries.agent_judgment_boundary: Harness results are evidence for the agent; they do not define ordinary host-repo package behavior.
